game_info.title: Chromatic Ascent
game_info.concept:
Get ready for an addictive and visually stunning gaming experience with Color Switch! This mobile game challenges you to navigate through obstacles by matching your character's color with the color of the obstacles.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/color-switch/id1314725881

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Get ready for an addictive and visually stunning gaming experience with Color Switch! This mobile game challenges you to navigate through obstacles by matching your character's color with the color of the obstacles.

The Perfect Game to Test Your Perseverance

Color Switch is a challenging and addictive game that will test your reflexes and problem-solving skills. In this game, you must navigate your character through a series of obstacles by matching your character's color with the color of the obstacles. It sounds easy, but it's harder than it looks!

With over 1,000 levels to play, Color Switch will keep you entertained for hours on end.

As you progress through the game, the obstacles will become more challenging, and you'll need to use all your skills to keep your character alive. But don't worry, if you fail, you can always try again!

The game's vibrant colors and smooth animations will make you feel like you're inside a living painting. And the catchy music will keep you entertained as you play.

Whether you're a casual gamer or a hardcore completionist, Color Switch is the perfect game for you.

It's easy to pick up and play, but it's also challenging enough to keep you entertained for hours on end. So what are you waiting for? Download Color Switch today and see how far you can go!

Are you up for a challenge?
game_info.description: Welcome to CHROMATIC ASCENT! Guide your bouncing orb upwards through a series of rotating geometric puzzles. The rule is simple but strict: you can only pass through obstacles that match your orb's current color. Touching a different color is fatal. Collect stars for points and Color Changers to switch your hue. The higher you climb, the trickier the patterns become. Timing and precision are your only tools in this vibrant, infinite climb.
game_info.controls:
- Space / Arrow Up: Jump (Tap repeatedly to hover or climb)
- Arrow Left/Right: Minor horizontal adjustment
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Physics and Hover Stability Test. Verifies that the gravity and jump mechanics function correctly and that the player entity remains active.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will press the Jump key whenever the player's vertical velocity becomes positive (falling) and position is below a certain threshold. It ignores obstacles.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should hover around the starting area without falling off the bottom of the screen for at least 10 seconds (or until hitting the first obstacle).

TEST_2.test_description: Obstacle Navigation and Color Logic Test. Attempts to actively play the game to verify collision logic and state transitions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller analyzes the nearest obstacle's rotation and color segments. It calculates a "safe angle" relative to the player's color. It jumps only when the player's position aligns with a matching color segment or open space.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully pass at least 2-3 obstacles, collecting points, demonstrating that the color matching logic allows passage and incorrect colors trigger collision events (though collision might eventually occur due to simple AI limits).
